title: sorghum miliiforme
intro: Sorghum miliiforme, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of grass that belongs to the sorghum family and is commonly found in Africa and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Sorghum miliiforme include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Sorghum miliiforme include teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to treat various health ailments.
